JIANGXIAOMOD-RUINANCE.title: Ruinance
JIANGXIAOMOD-QING_MANG.title: Green Glow
JIANGXIAOMOD-QING_MANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Target loses {M:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
If target has [blue]Artifact[/blue], deals {X}x damage.
[gold]Strike[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRIKE_JIANG_XIAO.title: Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-DEFEND_JIANG_XIAO.title: Defend
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING.title: Blessing
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ENEMY_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Enemy
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ENEMY_TOKEN.descri: Heal an enemy {HealAmount:diff()} HP and Stun them.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ALLY_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Ally
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ALL_ENEMY_TOKEN.de: Heal all enemies {HealAmount:diff()} HP and Stun them.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_SELF_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Self
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN.title: Cheng Yin
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN.description:
Apply [gold]Cheng Yin[/gold] to an ally.
When damaged, gain {M} Regen. Guiding the medical light of the bell.
JIANGXIAOMOD-ZHONG_LING.title: Bell
JIANGXIAOMOD-ZHONG_LING.description: Cast medical light to Heal random targets {Magic:diff()} times for {Heal:diff()} HP each. Prioritizes allies with [gold]Cheng Yin[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN.title: Dawn
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING.title: Yearning Halo
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING.description:
Apply [gold]Yearning Halo[/gold] to all allies with [gold]Dawn[/gold].
If none, apply to all units.
Currently provides {M}% Lifesteal.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT.title: Retrograde Light
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT.descriptio: Choose [gold]Enemy[/gold] or [gold]Ally[/gold]: Average your HP with the target.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ENEMY.desc: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose an enemy; average your HP with theirs.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ALLY.title: Retrograde Light: Ally
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ALLY.descr: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose an ally; average your HP with theirs.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT.title: Resentment
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT.description: When attacked, has a {M:diff()}% chance to inflict a random [gold]Debuff[/gold] on the attacker.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SPACE_GAP.title: Space Rift
JIANGXIAOMOD-SPACE_GAP.description:
Gain {M:diff()} [blue]Intangible[/blue].
At [red]Diamond Rank[/red], apply 1 [blue]Intangible[/blue] to an ally.
JIANGXIAOMOD-ABUNDANT_STAR.title: Abundant Star Power
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_CONCEAL.title: Star Conceal
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_CONCEAL.description:
Choose an ally to gain {E:diff()} [blue]Energy[/blue].
At [red]Diamond Rank[/red], affects all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SHADOW_OF_VOID.title: Void Ruin Shadow
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRENGTHEN_TOKEN.title: Strengthen
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRENGTHEN_TOKEN.descriptio: Choose a card in your deck to Upgrade.
JIANGXIAOMOD-REST_TOKEN.title: Rest
JIANGXIAOMOD-SECONDARY_FACE.title: Secondary Face
JIANGXIAOMOD-SECONDARY_FACE.description: Choose a card in your hand and add {M:diff()} copies to your hand. Copies cost 0 and have [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW.title: Tear of Sorrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW.description:
Apply {M:diff()} [gold]Tear of Sorrow[/gold] to all units.
(If Star Technique is [red]Platinum[/red] or higher, only affects all enemies).
JIANGXIAOMOD-CLEAN_TEARS.title: Clean Tears
JIANGXIAOMOD-CLEAN_TEARS.description:
Cleanse {M:diff()} [blue]Status[/blue] & [blue]Curse[/blue] cards from your Draw/Hand/Discard piles.
Remove all [gold]Debuffs[/gold] from all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-UNARMED_STRIKE.title: Unarmed Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE1.title: Xia Style I: Heartless Cleave
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE2.title: Xia Style II: Heartless Vertical
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE3.title: Xia Style III: Heartless Vertical
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE_TRUE.title: True Xia Style: Clean House
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE_TRUE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deals {X}x damage if you have Xia Style I, II, and III.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARROW.title: Basic Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {M:diff()} cards with [blue]Bow Mastery[/blue].
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_ARROW.title: Star Power Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_ARROW.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
(Enhanced by [gold]Bow Mastery Level[/gold] & [gold]Star Power Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHERING_ARROW.title: Withering Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHERING_ARROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {M:diff()} Poison and {D:diff()} Calamity.
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_SKILL_STRIKE.title: God: Technique Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_SKILL_STRIKE.descriptio:
Play all [gold]Basic Technique[/gold] cards.
Gain {M} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each card played.
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_STAR_STRIKE.title: God: Star Tech Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_STAR_STRIKE.description:
Play all [gold]Star Technique[/gold] cards.
Gain {M} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each card played.
JIANGXIAOMOD-MUAY_THAI_TECHNIQUE.title: Muay Thai
JIANGXIAOMOD-CUNJIN_ECHO.title: Fist: Echo
JIANGXIAOMOD-CUNJIN_ECHO.description: Choose an Attack card in your hand; give it [gold]Echo[/gold] {M:diff()}.
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAGGER_ATTACK.title: Dagger Attack
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAGGER_BURST.title: Dagger Burst
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAGGER_ALL_OUT_STRIKE.title: Dagger All-Out
JIANGXIAOMOD-FANG_TIAN_JI_HEAVY_STRIKE.d:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply {M:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-FANG_TIAN_JI_DEFENSIVE.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply {M:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-FANG_TIAN_JI_OFFENSIVE.desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {X} times.
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_BASE.title: Combat Knife: Basic
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_BASE.descripti: Choose [gold]Knife: Slash[/gold] or [gold]Knife: Stab[/gold]; add {M} copies to your [blue]Hand[/blue] and [blue]Exhaust Pile[/blue].
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_SLASH.title: Combat Knife: Slash
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_STAB.title: Combat Knife: Stab
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_ADVANCED.title: Combat Knife: Advanced
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_ADVANCED.descr:
Gain [gold]Combat Knife: Advanced Effect[/gold] this turn.
Choose [gold]Stable & Accurate[/gold] or [gold]Agile & Quick[/gold]; add {M} copies to your [blue]Hand[/blue] and [blue]Exhaust Pile[/blue].
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_STABLE.title: Knife: Stable & Accurate
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_STABLE.descrip: Gain {X} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {Y} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] for each [gold]Combat Knife Mastery[/gold] Attack and Skill card in your [blue]Exhaust Pile[/blue].
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_FLEXIBLE.title: Knife: Agile & Quick
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_FLEXIBLE.descr: Choose {X} [gold]Combat Knife Mastery[/gold] cards from your [blue]Exhaust Pile[/blue] and play them automatically.
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_EXPERT.title: Combat Knife: Expert
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_EXPERT.descrip: Choose [gold]Infinite Rips[/gold] or [gold]Forbidden Zone[/gold]; add {M} copies to your [blue]Hand[/blue] and [blue]Exhaust Pile[/blue].
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_FORBIDDEN_ZONE:
Remove 1 enemy [gold]Buff[/gold] and remove their [gold]Block[/gold].
Play all [gold]Combat Knife Mastery[/gold] cards in your hand.
JIANGXIAOMOD-DECOY.title: Decoy (Beta)
JIANGXIAOMOD-DECOY.description:
Summon a Decoy with {M} HP.
(Work in progress - do not select!!)
JIANGXIAOMOD-SILENCE_OF_VOID.title: Voice of Silence
JIANGXIAOMOD-SILENCE_OF_VOID.description:
[gold]Star Technique[/gold].
Seal all enemy [gold]Positive Effects[/gold] into [blue]Voice of Silence[/blue] for {T} turns. Returns effects when finished.
Quality Bonus: {DPercent}% Max HP damage and Stun.
JIANGXIAOMOD-DOMAIN_OF_TEARS.title: Domain of Tears
JIANGXIAOMOD-DOMAIN_OF_TEARS.description:
Gain [gold]Domain of Tears[/gold].
Currently plays {M} cards.
JIANGXIAOMOD-EARTH_LIGHT.title: Earth Light
JIANGXIAOMOD-EARTH_LIGHT.description: Choose a [blue]Star Map[/blue] to replace your current one.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BEI_DOU_NINE_STARS_TOKEN.ti: Star Map: Big Dipper Nine Stars
JIANGXIAOMOD-BEI_DOU_NINE_STARS_TOKEN.de:
Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Big Dipper Nine Stars[/blue] capability.
JIANGXIAOMOD-FLOWER_BLADE_TOKEN.title: Star Map: Flower Blade
JIANGXIAOMOD-FLOWER_BLADE_TOKEN.descript:
Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Flower Blade[/blue] capability.
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHER_BOW_TOKEN.title: Star Map: Wither Bow
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHER_BOW_TOKEN.descriptio:
Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Wither Bow[/blue] capability.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SOUL_OF_DEVOURING_SEA_TOKEN: Star Map: Soul of Devouring Sea

Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Soul of Devouring Sea[/blue] capability.
Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Star Martial Records[/blue] capability.
JIANGXIAOMOD-INK_FLOWER_TOKEN.title: Star Map: Ink Flower
JIANGXIAOMOD-INK_FLOWER_TOKEN.descriptio:
Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Ink Flower[/blue] capability.
JIANGXIAOMOD-HOLY_CROSS_TOKEN.title: Star Map: Holy Cross
JIANGXIAOMOD-HOLY_CROSS_TOKEN.descriptio:
Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Holy Cross[/blue] capability.
JIANGXIAOMOD-PEAK_OF_LIFE_TOKEN.title: Star Map: Peak of Life
JIANGXIAOMOD-PEAK_OF_LIFE_TOKEN.descript:
Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Peak of Life[/blue] capability.
JIANGXIAOMOD-EARTH_STAR_MAP_TOKEN.title: Star Map: Earth
JIANGXIAOMOD-EARTH_STAR_MAP_TOKEN.descri:
Remove your current [blue]Star Map[/blue].
Gain [blue]Earth[/blue] capability.
